name: teacher-ai-cookbook
description: Configurable AI Voice Tutor — Teacher Cookbook + Student Live Agent on a single Firebase project.

scripts.build: npm run build:cookbook && npm run build:student && npm run build:functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only firestore && firebase deploy --only functions && firebase deploy --only hosting:cookbook && firebase deploy --only hosting:student
scripts.deploy:cookbook: npm run build:cookbook && firebase deploy --only hosting:cookbook
scripts.deploy:student: npm run build:student && firebase deploy --only hosting:student
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions
